activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference
EU origin normalization and allowance of additional EU member states in invoice

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' from certificate exactly matches invoice issuer 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' including address and country Sweden after normalization. Land matches exactly. No mismatch found.

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti.' can be clearly identified in invoice delivery and invoice addresses including country Turkey matching certificate consignee. Invoice contains explicit consignee details consistent with certificate.

goods_description.certificate_value: Components for Culturing Media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)
goods_description.invoice_value: Various product lines related to culturing media components identified in multiple invoice line items including ASP™, SpermGrad™, SpermRinse™, G-MOPS™ PLUS, HYASE-10X™, G-IVF™ PLUS and others under HS code 382100.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses general goods description 'Components for Culturing Media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)' with explicit invoice reference 'See attached invoice 2510582 dated 20250805'. Invoice number and date match certificate reference, enabling acceptance of general description per rule 4.3.5.

quantity.motivation: Certificate gross weight '262,40 kg' matches invoice gross weight '262,4 kg' after allowed normalization of decimal and comma notation. Units are consistent. No discrepancy found.

origin.motivation: Certificate indicates origin as 'European Community' (equivalent to EU). Invoice specifies origin as 'Sweden', an EU member state. Origin is verified with EU normalization and allowed additional member country in invoice.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) match perfectly. Invoice reference and date correspond exactly. Normalizations applied are within allowed boundaries. No discrepancies or uncertainties detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet kan verifieras mot fakturan utan avvikelser. Consignor, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland stämmer överens. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
